events.name: DesignTO Festival (16th)
events.note: Canada's largest annual design festival — 100+ free events and exhibitions across the city.

events.name: Tokyo Creative Salon
events.note: City-wide fashion and design event spanning nine districts of Tokyo.

events.name: Milan Design Week / Salone del Mobile
events.note: The world's leading furniture fair and design week. Salone del Mobile runs Apr 21–26 at Rho Fiera; Fuorisalone events across the city from Apr 20.

events.name: NYCxDesign (14th)
events.note: Multi-disciplinary festival spanning architecture, technology, product, graphic, urban, industrial, and interior design.

events.name: Melbourne Design Week (10th)
events.note: 10th anniversary edition — 400+ events celebrating design, with themes of futuristic tech, Indigenous design, and architecture.

events.name: 3 Days of Design
events.note: International design festival celebrating Scandinavian and contemporary design across multiple venues.

events.name: Helsinki Design Week (21st)
events.note: 21st anniversary — 250+ events including open studios, exhibitions, talks, fashion shows, and parties.

events.name: Paris Design Week
events.note: 10-day fringe design event running alongside Maison et Objet September edition.

events.name: London Design Festival (24th)
events.note: Annual festival celebrating design disciplines including architecture, technology, and art.

events.name: Vienna Design Week (20th)
events.note: 20th edition — Austria's most important multidisciplinary and curated design festival.

events.name: Dutch Design Week
events.note: Northern Europe's largest design event — 2,000+ designers, 350,000+ visitors, 100+ locations.

events.name: Design Miami/ Paris
events.note: Leading international fair for modern and contemporary collectible design.

events.name: Designart Tokyo
events.note: Tokyo's largest fall design event spanning multiple districts.

events.name: Dubai Design Week
events.note: Annual celebration of design innovation in the Middle East.

events.name: Design Miami/ (22nd)
events.note: 22nd edition at Pride Park — leading international fair for modern and contemporary collectible design, running alongside Art Basel Miami Beach.

events.name: Stockholm Design Week / Furniture Fair
events.note: Cancelled for 2026; moving to biennial format starting 2027. In 2025, ran Feb 4–8. Grassroots Stockholm Creative Edition (Feb 3–7, 2026) organized by Swedish brands as an alternative.

events.name: Beijing Design Week
events.note: Major annual design event. Typically held Sep–Oct. In 2025, ran Sep 25 – Oct 7. No official 2026 dates announced.

events.name: DW! Semana de Design de São Paulo (15ª)
events.note: O maior festival de design urbano da América Latina. 15ª edição com 120+ expositores em lojas, galerias, espaços criativos e centros culturais pela cidade.

events.name: Rio2C – Rio Creative Conference
events.note: Principal evento de criatividade do Brasil com Summit, Conferência, Mercados e Festivalia na Cidade das Artes.

events.name: Casa Cor São Paulo
events.location: Parque da Água Branca, São Paulo, Brasil
events.note: Mostra de 65+ ambientes contemplando arquitetura, design de interiores, paisagismo, arte, lojas e restaurantes.

events.name: High Design Expo
events.note: 15.000 m² dedicados a design de mobiliário, lançamentos, inovações e tendências para arquitetos, designers de interiores e compradores. Em 2025, realizado em agosto. Datas de 2026 ainda não confirmadas.

events.name: Wallpaper* Design Awards
events.note: Annual awards by Wallpaper* magazine covering architecture, art, fashion, interiors, tech, and travel. Featured in Feb 2026 issue.

events.name: Core77 Design Awards
events.note: Honors projects across 20 design disciplines. Early bird deadline Jan 31; regular Feb 28; final Mar 28.

events.name: iF Design Award Ceremony
events.note: iF Design Award Night. Final jury Feb 10–12 in Hamburg. Trend Conference follows Apr 28.

events.name: A' Design Award — Results
events.note: Late deadline Feb 28; last entry Mar 30; results announced May 1.

events.name: D&AD Awards & Festival
events.note: Judging May 17–20; winners announced May 20. Shortlist announced May 19–20.

events.name: Dezeen Awards
events.note: Eligible projects completed Jun 1, 2024 – May 31, 2026. Regional showcases Sep; winners mid-Nov.

events.name: European Design Awards
events.note: Deadline Feb 13. Celebrates the best of European graphic, digital, and spatial design.

events.name: Red Dot Award Ceremony — Product Design
events.note: Product Design ceremony Jul 7 in Essen. Brands & Communication Design ceremony Nov 6 in Berlin. Design Concept ceremony TBD in Singapore.

events.name: Good Design Award (Japan)
events.note: Organized by Japan Institute of Design Promotion. Results and exhibition in autumn.

events.name: Prêmio Design MCB (36ª edição)
events.location: Museu da Casa Brasileira, São Paulo, Brasil
events.note: Inscrições encerradas Jan 28. Resultado final Abr 25. Exposição de Abr 25 a Jul 19. Participação gratuita, aberto a brasileiros e estrangeiros residentes no Brasil há 2+ anos.

events.name: BDA – Prêmio Brasileiro de Design
events.note: Organizado pela ABEDESIGN. 15ª edição em 2025 (tema: 'Colaborar e Transformar'), cerimônia realizada em 15 de dezembro de 2025 na Sala São Paulo. 14 categorias incluindo Branding, Design de Produto, Design Digital e Design de Impacto Social. Parceria com iF Design Award para visibilidade internacional. Datas de 2026 ainda não anunciadas.

events.name: Maison et Objet Paris (January)
events.note: Leading trade fair for decoration, design, and lifestyle — January edition.

events.name: IMM Cologne
events.note: International furniture fair showcasing interior décor products and latest furniture trends.

events.name: Ambiente Frankfurt
events.note: World's most important consumer goods fair — 4,600+ exhibitors, 148,000+ participants. Concurrent with Creativeworld and Christmasworld.

events.name: Design Shanghai (13th)
events.note: Asia's leading design showcase. Next edition: Mar 4–7, 2027.

events.name: ICFF – International Contemporary Furniture Fair
events.note: North America's leading contemporary design fair — 400+ design brands. Theme: 'Common Ground: A Global Dialogue on Design and Shared Values.' Part of NYCxDesign.

events.name: Design Tokyo
events.note: International trade show for design products and innovations.

events.name: Maison et Objet Paris (September)
events.note: Leading trade fair for decoration, design, and lifestyle — September edition. Runs alongside Paris Design Week.

events.name: Adobe MAX
events.location: Miami Beach Convention Center, Miami, USA
events.note: Adobe's annual creativity conference. Preconference Nov 8–9; online component Nov 10–11. 12,000+ in-person attendees expected.
